1.1 Epilepsy
Adjunctive Therapy
LAMICTAL is indicated as adjunctive therapy for the following seizure types in patients aged
2 years and older:
• partial-onset seizures.
• primary generalized tonic-clonic (PGTC) seizures.
• generalized seizures of Lennox-Gastaut syndrome.
Monotherapy
